summary: Small documentation cleanup in README setup instructions: corrected the compiler archive extraction step from "Extract it's content" to "Extract its contents" for GC_WII_COMPILERS.zip into `/tools/mwcc_compiler/`.
what_changed: Updated README.md setup step 2 for the GC/Wii compiler package.
Changed singular "content" to plural "contents" in the extraction instruction targeting `/tools/mwcc_compiler/`.
smart_moves: Kept the fix narrowly scoped to a single README grammar line with no unrelated documentation churn.
Preserved the original setup meaning and path while improving clarity for new contributors following the build instructions.
decomp_lessons: Even minor README wording matters in a decompilation project because setup instructions for proprietary compiler tooling are a common onboarding point.
Documentation-only PRs should avoid changing technical meaning unless the evidence supports it; this PR only corrected grammar around an existing compiler extraction step.
